next_steps: Obtain rheumatoid factor, anti-CCP antibodies, ANA, ANCA, and complement levels (C3, C4)
Perform cryoglobulin testing and serum protein electrophoresis/immunofixation if not already finalized
Schedule a combined sural nerve and gastrocnemius muscle biopsy for histological evaluation for vasculitis
Consider initiating a trial of intravenous corticosteroids if vasculitis is suspected
Continue pyridoxine supplementation and monitor for neurological improvement
Perform a more comprehensive neurological assessment and formal cognitive testing once pain is better managed
